title: Cicero: Letter 8 (to Atticus or Family)
description: Letter 8 of Cicero — one of nearly 800 surviving letters that document the last decades of the Roman Republic.
introduction: Letter 8 of Cicero — one of nearly 800 surviving letters that document the last decades of the Roman Republic.

translation.text: Letter 8: 'Greetings, my dear friend. The political situation grows daily more grave. Caesar marches on Rome. The Republic stands on the edge of an abyss. Let us not lose hope, but stand firm in our principles.'
